---
title: "MATH 3190"
---

This website contains homework assignments for Math 3190.

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(ggplot2)

t <- seq(0, 2*pi, by=0.1)
x <- 16*sin(t)^3
y <- 13*cos(t)-5*cos(2*t)-2*cos(3*t)-cos(4*t)
df <- data.frame(t=t, x=x, y=y)

ggplot(df, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_polygon(fill="pink", col="black") +
  theme_void() +
  coord_fixed()
```
